chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3449 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge Present: Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro & Mrs.Kausar Sultana Hussain, JJ. 1. For orders on CMA No.1870/2022. 2. For orders on CMA No.15300/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 22.7.2022 Mr.Abdul Rauf Malik, Advocate for petitioner. ************* Petitioner claims to be Noha Khawan, has filed this petition seeking special security in the form of police guards as he has been receiving threats from banned organizations. No material in this respect has been placed on record to confirm it. Petitioner being citizen of Pakistan is entitled to usual protection under the law, which the Courts below, where he has filed applications for the said purpose, have already ordered to provide him. No case for indulgence under Article 199 of the Constitution is made out, the petition is dismissed in limini. The petition stands disposed of in above terms along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
